_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish manpower, personnel, and qualification data element standards to support cyber workforce management and reporting requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-004 (SP, cosine: 0.529), TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.524).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.474). Shared vocabulary: [data, requirements, standards]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, element, establish, management, manpower, personnel] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, develop, enterprise, llm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.875, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.9%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Establish manpower, personnel, and qualification data element standards to suppo" and "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.538 > STS 0.474 (gap +0.064). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, requirements, standards] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [data, requirements, standards]. DCWF-only: [cyber, element, establish, management, manpower, personnel]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, develop, enterprise, llm].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.9% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
